updateNote: Day 65 12:13 PM PT refresh — Bulk carrier (likely Liberian-flagged Minoan Falcon) attacked by multiple small craft 11nm off Sirik at 11:30 UTC — first such Hormuz attack since April 22. Treasury Sec. Bessent says US 'suffocating' Iran via blockade; Iran may shut oil wells. CENTCOM Adm. Cooper visits USS Milius — 49 commercial vessels redirected (up from 33). IDF strikes ~120 Hezbollah sites across S. Lebanon over weekend; 41 killed in 24h. IDF demolishes Catholic convent in Yaroun. Mojtaba Khamenei calls 'economic jihad,' new Hormuz 'management.' OFAC May 1 'Operation Economic Fury' sanctions 6 indiv + 21 entities + 1 vessel. Brent eases to $108.17 (-2.02% on ceasefire optimism, +35.5%), WTI $101.94 (+35.0%). AAA gas $4.446 (+42.0%) holds. Iran rial 1,840,000/USD. 31 tankers / 53M barrels / $4.8B+ stranded. USS Gerald R. Ford departs after record 309-day deployment. Hormuz Day 62.
dataFreshnessWarning: Data current as of 12:13 PM PT, May 3, 2026 (Day 65). Oil prices and breaking events update multiple times daily.
